objective: Strategie de Momentum sur APTUSDC 4h. Indicateurs : EMA(10), EMA(30), ADX, ATR. Entree short quand EMA(10) < EMA(30), ADX >= 25 confirme la tendance. Stop-loss = 2.0x ATR, take-profit = 5.0x ATR.

iterations.hypothesis: Combining EMA(10), EMA(30), ADX and ATR provides a robust momentum strategy on APTUSDC 4h.

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] This strategy combines EMA(10), EMA(30), ADX and ATR to create a momentum strategy on APTUSDC 4h. The entry is triggered when EMA(10) < EMA(30) and ADX >= 25, with stop-loss at 2.0x ATR and take profit at 5.0x ATR. Exit conditions include: ADX <= 20 or (close > ema(close, period).middle AND stop = ATR * risk_multiplier)
[Backup plan] 1. If results are poor, try adjusting the risk multiplier to increase/decrease position size and see if it improves performance. 2. If returns remain mediocre, consider adding additional indicators or modifying existing ones. 3. In case this strategy fails, explore other momentum strategies such as those based on Bollinger Bands.
